content.text:
✅ **`npm install` now succeeds!**

The failure was due to an incorrect dependency version for `@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent`.  
I updated `package.json`:

```json
{
  ...
  "dependencies": {
    "@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent": "^0.64.0"
  },
  ...
}
```

Running `npm install` again now installs all 258 packages with no errors.

> **Next steps (optional)**  
> If you want to compile the TypeScript sources (`npm run build`), you might run into other missing types or TS errors related to the `@mariozechner/pi-tui` and `@google/genai` packages. Those can be addressed separately once the core dependencies are resolved.

Feel free to let me know if you need help with the build or any other part of the project!
